content_view_environments.description: List of content view environments to add to activation key. Mutually exclusive with C(content_view) and C(lifecycle_environment).

subscriptions.description: List of subscriptions that include either Name, Pool ID, or Upstream Pool ID. Pool IDs are preferred since Names and Upstream Pool IDs are not guaranteed to be unique. The module will fail if it finds more than one match. This parameter is not supported in SCA mode.

host_collections.description: List of host collections to add to activation key

content_overrides.description: List of content overrides that include label and override state Label refers to repository C(content_label). For Red Hat products for example C(rhel-7-server-rpms). For custom products it's in the format C(<organization_label>_<product_label>_<repository_label>), e.g. C(ExampleOrg_ExampleProduct_ExampleRepository). Override state ('enabled', 'disabled', or 'default') sets initial state of repository for newly registered hosts

auto_attach.description: Set Auto-Attach on or off The C(auto_attach) parameter is deprecated since Katello 4.13 and not available after Katello 4.19

max_hosts.description: Maximum number of registered content hosts. Required if I(unlimited_hosts=false)

unlimited_hosts.description: Can the activation key have unlimited hosts

state.description: State of the Activation Key If C(copied) the key will be copied to a new one with I(new_name) as the name and all other fields left untouched C(present_with_defaults) will ensure the entity exists, but won't update existing ones

new_name.description: Name of the new activation key when state == copied

updated_name.description: New architecture name. When this parameter is set, the module will not be idempotent.

theforeman.foreman.auth_source_ldap.description: Create, update, and delete LDAP authentication sources

name.description: The name of the LDAP authentication source

host.description: The hostname of the LDAP server

port.description: The port number of the LDAP server

account.description: Account name to use when accessing the LDAP server.

account_password.description: Account password to use when accessing the LDAP server. Required when using I(onthefly_register). When this parameter is set, the module will not be idempotent.

base_dn.description: The base DN to use when searching.

attr_login.description: Attribute containing login ID. Required when using I(onthefly_register).

attr_firstname.description: Attribute containing first name. Required when using I(onthefly_register).

attr_lastname.description: Attribute containing last name. Required when using I(onthefly_register).

attr_mail.description: Attribute containing email address. Required when using I(onthefly_register).

onthefly_register.description: Whether or not to register users on the fly.

usergroup_sync.description: Whether or not to sync external user groups on login

tls.description: Whether or not to use TLS when contacting the LDAP server.

use_netgroups.description: Whether to use NIS netgroups instead of posix groups, not valid for I(server_type=active_directory) Deprecated: The I(use_netgroups) parameter is deprecated with Foreman 3.16 in favor of I(ldap_group_membership) and will be removed in a future release.

ldap_group_membership.description: Which group membership method to use, not valid for I(server_type=active_directory). Option I(rfc4519) is valid only for I(server_type=posix).

ldap_filter.description: Filter to apply to LDAP searches

public.description: Make bookmark available for all users

theforeman.foreman.compute_attribute.description: Manage Compute Attributes This beta version can create, and update compute attributes

vm_attrs.description: Hash containing the data of vm_attrs

theforeman.foreman.compute_profile.description: Create, update, and delete Compute Profiles

compute_attributes.description: Compute attributes related to this compute profile. Some of these attributes are specific to the underlying compute resource type

theforeman.foreman.compute_resource.description: Create, update, and delete Compute Resources

provider.description: Compute resource provider. Required if I(state=present_with_defaults).

provider_params.description: Parameter specific to compute resource provider. Required if I(state=present_with_defaults).

theforeman.foreman.config_group.description: Create, update, and delete (Puppet) config groups

updated_name.description: New config group name. When this parameter is set, the module will not be idempotent.

puppetclasses.description: List of puppet classes to include in this group

content_type.description: Type of credential Required when creating a new credential

content.description: Content of the content credential Required when creating a new credential

theforeman.foreman.content_export_librar.description: Export library content to a directory.

destination_server.description: Destination server name; optional parameter to differentiate between exports

fail_on_missing_content.description: Fails if any of the repositories belonging to this organization are unexportable.

theforeman.foreman.content_export_reposi.description: Export repository content to a directory.

repository.description: Name of the repository to export.

product.description: Name of the product that the repository belongs to.

theforeman.foreman.content_export_versio.short_description: Manage content view version content exports
theforeman.foreman.content_export_versio.description: Export a content view version to a directory.

destination_server.description: Destination server name; optional parameter to differentiate between exports

fail_on_missing_content.description: Fails if any of the repositories belonging to this version are unexportable.

theforeman.foreman.content_import_versio.short_description: Manage content view version content imports

theforeman.foreman.content_upload.description: Allows the upload of content to a repository

src.description: File (on the remote/target machine) to upload

repository.description: Repository to upload file in to

product.description: Product to which the repository lives in

ostree_repository_name.description: Name of repository within the OSTree archive. Required for OSTree uploads.

label.description: Label of the Content View. This field cannot be updated.

repositories.description: List of repositories that include name and product. Cannot be combined with I(composite=True).

auto_publish.description: Auto publish composite view when a new version of a component content view is created. Also note auto publish will only happen when the component is marked "latest".

solve_dependencies.description: Solve RPM dependencies by default on Content View publish

import_only.description: Designate this Content View for importing from upstream servers only.

rolling.description: A rolling content view contains latest synced state of repositories.

lifecycle_environments.description: List of lifecycle environments that content of this rolling content view will be promoted to. Only valid for I(rolling=True).

composite.description: A composite view contains other content views.

components.description: List of content views to includes content_view and either version or latest. Ignored if I(composite=False).

theforeman.foreman.content_view_filter.description: Create and manage content View filters

name.description: Name of the Content View Filter

description.description: Description of the Content View Filter

state.description: State of the content view filter

repositories.description: List of repositories that include name and product An empty Array means all current and future repositories

original_packages.description: Include all RPMs with no errata

original_module_streams.description: Include all module streams with no errata Only valid on I(filter_type=modulemd).

theforeman.foreman.content_view_filter_i.short_description: Fetch information about a Content View Filter
theforeman.foreman.content_view_filter_i.description: Fetch information about a Content View Filter

content_view.description: the name of the content view that the filter applies to

theforeman.foreman.content_view_filter_r.description: Create, manage and remove content view filter rules

architecture.description: set package, module_stream, etc. architecture that the rule applies to

content_view.description: the name of the content view that the filter applies to

content_view_filter.description: the name of the content view filter that the rule applies to

context.description: the context for a module only valid in filter I(type=modulemd)

date_type.description: set whether rule applied to erratum using the 'Issued On' or 'Updated On' date only valid on filter I(type=erratum).

end_date.description: the rule limit for erratum end date (YYYY-MM-DD) see date_type for the date the rule applies to Only valid on I(filter_type=erratum_by_date).

name.description: Content view filter rule name, package name, package_group name, module stream or docker tag If omitted, the value of I(name) will be used if necessary for module stream filters, this is the name of the module stream to search for

start_date.description: the rule limit for erratum start date (YYYY-MM-DD) see date_type for the date the rule applies to Only valid on I(filter_type=erratum).

stream.description: the context for a module only valid in filter I(type=modulemd)

types.description: errata types the ruel applies to (enhancement, bugfix, security) Only valid on I(filter_type=erratum)

theforeman.foreman.content_view_filter_r.short_description: Fetch information about a Content View Filter Rule
theforeman.foreman.content_view_filter_r.description: Fetch information about a Content View Filter Rule

content_view.description: the name of the content view that the filter applies to

content_view_filter.description: the name of the content view filter that the rule applies to

errata_id.description: for erratum fitlers using errata_by_id, the errata id to search for

theforeman.foreman.content_view_history_.short_description: Fetch history of a Content View
theforeman.foreman.content_view_history_.description: Fetch history of a Content View

content_view.description: Content view to get the history for

theforeman.foreman.content_view_version.description: Publish, Promote or Remove a Content View Version

description.description: Description of the Content View Version

lifecycle_environments.description: The lifecycle environments the Content View Version should be in.

force_promote.description: Force content view promotion and bypass lifecycle environment restriction

force_yum_metadata_regeneration.description: Force metadata regeneration when performing Publish and Promote tasks

current_lifecycle_environment.description: The lifecycle environment that is already associated with the content view version Helpful for promoting a content view version

content_view.description: Content View to which the Version belongs

search.description: Expression to match newly discovered hosts with Required if I(state=present)

hostgroup.description: Hostgroup to assign hosts to Required if I(state=present)

hostname.description: Hostname to assign to discovered host(s) When matching multiple hosts, must provide unique hostnames for each of the discovered hosts

max_count.description: Maximum amount of hosts to provision with the rule 0 means no limit

updated_name.description: New domain name. When this parameter is set, the module will not be idempotent.

dns_proxy.description: DNS proxy to use within this domain for managing A records

theforeman.foreman.external_usergroup.description: Create, update, and delete external user groups

auth_source.description: Name of the authentication source to be used for this group

url.description: Base URL of the flatpak registry index, like C(https://flatpaks.redhat.io/rhel/), C(https://registry.fedoraproject.org).

theforeman.foreman.flatpak_remote_reposi.description: Mirror a Flatpak Remote Repository to a Product

product.description: Product to mirror the remote repository to

updated_name.description: New name of the Global Parameter. When this parameter is set, the module will not be idempotent.

hidden_value.description: Whether the value should be hidden in the GUI

info.description: General description of the hardware model

vendor_class.description: The class of the machine as reported by the OpenBoot PROM. This is primarily used by Solaris SPARC builds and can be left blank for other architectures.

hardware_model.description: The class of CPU supplied in this machine. This is primarily used by Sparc Solaris builds and can be left blank for other architectures.

name.description: Fully Qualified Domain Name of host

hostgroup.description: Title of related hostgroup Example: A child hostgroup I(bar) within a parent hostgroup I(foo) would have the title I(foo/bar).

build.description: Whether or not to setup build context for the host

managed.description: Whether a host is managed or unmanaged. Forced to true when I(build=true)

ip.description: IP address of the primary interface of the host.

mac.description: MAC address of the primary interface of the host. Please include leading zeros and separate nibbles by colons, otherwise the execution will not be idempotent. Example EE:BB:01:02:03:04

owner.description: Owner (user) of the host. Users are looked up by their C(login). Mutually exclusive with I(owner_group).

owner_group.description: Owner (user group) of the host. Mutually exclusive with I(owner).

provision_method.description: The method used to provision the host. I(provision_method=bootdisk) is only available if the bootdisk plugin is installed.

image.description: The image to use when I(provision_method=image). The I(compute_resource) parameter is required to find the correct image.

compute_attributes.description: Additional compute resource specific attributes. When this parameter is set, the module will not be idempotent. When you provide a I(cluster) here and I(compute_resource) is set, the cluster id will be automatically looked up.

updated_name.description: New name of the host collection. When this parameter is set, the module will not be idempotent.

host.description: Name of the host to fetch errata for.

content_view.description: Calculate Applicable Errata based on a particular Content View. Required together with I(lifecycle_environment). If this is set, I(organization) also needs to be set.

lifecycle_environment.description: Calculate Applicable Errata based on a particular Lifecycle Environment. Required together with I(content_view). If this is set, I(organization) also needs to be set.

theforeman.foreman.host_power.description: Manage power state of a host This beta version can start and stop an existing foreman host and question the current power state.

updated_name.description: New name of hostgroup. When this parameter is set, the module will not be idempotent.

parent.description: Title of the parent Hostgroup. Can be nested in the form "Main Group/Sub Group".

organization.description: Organization for scoped resources attached to the hostgroup. Only used for Katello installations. This organization will implicitly be added to the I(organizations) parameter if needed.

ansible_roles.description: A list of ansible roles to associate with the hostgroup. The foreman-ansible plugin must be installed to use this parameter.

theforeman.foreman.http_proxy.description: Create, update, and delete HTTP Proxies

url.description: URL of the HTTP Proxy Required when creating a new HTTP Proxy.

proxy_username.description: Username used to authenticate with the HTTP Proxy

proxy_password.description: Password used to authenticate with the HTTP Proxy When this parameter is set, the module will not be idempotent.

compute_resource.description: Compute resource the image is assigned to

uuid.description: UUID or Marketplace URN of the operatingsystem image

image_username.description: Username that is used to login into the operating system

image_password.description: Password that is used to login into the operating system

theforeman.foreman.installation_medium.description: Create, update, and delete Installation Media

name.description: The full installation medium name. The special name "*" (only possible as parameter) is used to perform bulk actions (modify, delete) on all existing partition tables.

updated_name.description: New full installation medium name. When this parameter is set, the module will not be idempotent.

os_family.description: The OS family the template shall be assigned with. If no os_family is set but a operatingsystem, the value will be derived from it.

theforeman.foreman.job_invocation.description: Invoke and schedule Remote Execution Jobs

bookmark.description: Bookmark to infer the search query from

targeting_type.description: Dynamic query updates the search results before execution (useful for scheduled jobs)

randomized_ordering.description: Whether to order the selected hosts randomly

execution_timeout_interval.description: Override the timeout interval from the template for this invocation only

command.description: Command to be executed on host. Required for command templates

scheduling.description: Schedule the job to start at a later time

concurrency_control.description: Control concurrency level and distribution over time

description_format.description: Override the description format from the template for this invocation only

feature.description: Feature label that should be triggered A job template assigned to this feature will be used

audit_comment.description: Content of the audit comment field

description_format.description: description of the job template. Template inputs can be referenced.

file_name.description: The path of a template file, that shall be imported. Either this or I(template) is required as a source for the Job Template "content".

job_category.description: The category the template should be assigend to

locked.description: Determines whether the template shall be locked

name.description: The name of the Job Template. If omited, will be determined from the C(name) header of the template or the filename (in that order). The special value "*" can be used to perform bulk actions (modify, delete) on all existing templates.

provider_type.description: Determines via which provider the template shall be executed

snippet.description: Determines whether the template shall be a snippet

template.description: The content of the Job Template. Either this or I(file_name) is required as a source for the Job Template "content".

template_inputs.description: The template inputs used in the Job Template

label.description: Label of the lifecycle environment. This field cannot be updated.

prior.description: Name of the parent lifecycle environment

parent.description: Title of a parent Location for nesting

organizations.description: List of organizations the location should be assigned to

ignore_types.description: List of resources types that will be automatically associated

updated_name.description: New operating system name. When this parameter is set, the module will not be idempotent.

release_name.description: Release name of the operating system (recommended for debian)

os_family.description: Distribution family of the Operating System

major.description: major version of the Operating System

minor.description: minor version of the Operating System

architectures.description: architectures, the operating system can be installed on

provisioning_templates.description: List of provisioning templates that are associated with the operating system. Specify the full list of template names you want to associate with your OS. For example ["Kickstart default", "Kickstart default finish", "Kickstart default iPXE", "custom"]. After specifying the template associations, you can set the default association in the M(theforeman.foreman.os_default_template) module.

ignore_types.description: List of resources types that will be automatically associated

theforeman.foreman.os_default_template.short_description: Manage Default Template Associations To Operating Systems

file_name.description: The path of a template file, that shall be imported. Either this or I(layout) is required as a source for the Partition Template "content".

layout.description: The content of the Partitioning Table Template Either this or I(file_name) is required as a source for the Partition Template "content".

locked.description: Determines whether the template shall be locked

name.description: The name of the Partition Table. If omited, will be determined from the C(name) header of the template or the filename (in that order). The special value "*" can be used to perform bulk actions (modify, delete) on all existing Partition Tables.

updated_name.description: New name of the template. When this parameter is set, the module will not be idempotent.

os_family.description: The OS family the template shall be assigned with.

gpg_key.description: Content GPG key name attached to this product

ssl_ca_cert.description: Content SSL CA certificate name attached to this product

ssl_client_cert.description: Content SSL client certificate name attached to this product

ssl_client_key.description: Content SSL client private key name attached to this product

sync_plan.description: Sync plan name attached to this product

description.description: Possibly long description to show the user in detail view

audit_comment.description: Content of the audit comment field

template.description: The content of the provisioning template. Either this or I(file_name) is required as a source for the Provisioning Template "content".

file_name.description: The path of a template file, that shall be imported. Either this or I(template) is required as a source for the Provisioning Template "content".

locked.description: Determines whether the template shall be locked

name.description: The name of the Provisioning Template. If omited, will be determined from the C(name) header of the template or the filename (in that order). The special value "*" can be used to perform bulk actions (modify, delete) on all existing templates.

updated_name.description: New provisioning template name. When this parameter is set, the module will not be idempotent.

theforeman.foreman.puppet_environment.description: Create, update, and delete Puppet Environments

theforeman.foreman.puppetclasses_import.short_description: Import Puppet Classes from a Proxy
theforeman.foreman.puppetclasses_import.description: Import Puppet Classes from a Proxy

smart_proxy.description: Smart Proxy to import Puppet Classes from

environment.description: Puppet Environment to import Puppet Classes from

except.description: Which types of Puppet Classes to exclude from the import.

realm_proxy.description: Proxy to use for this realm

theforeman.foreman.redhat_manifest.short_description: Interact with a Red Hat Satellite Subscription Manifest
theforeman.foreman.redhat_manifest.description: Download and modify a Red Hat Satellite Subscription Manifest

portal.description: Red Hat Portal subscription access address

content_access_mode.description: Content Access Mode of the Subscription Manifest. Setting I(content_access_mode=org_enviroment) enables Simple Content Access.

activation_keys.description: Activation keys for subscription-manager client, required for CentOS and Red Hat Enterprise Linux. Required only if host group has no activation keys.

force.description: Clear any previous registration and run C(subscription-manager) with C(--force).

hostgroup.description: Host group to register the host in.

ignore_subman_errors.description: Ignore C(subscription-manager) errors for C(subscription-manager register) command.

insecure.description: Enable insecure argument for the initial C(curl).

jwt_expiration.description: Expiration of the authorization token (in hours).

lifecycle_environment.description: Lifecycle environment for the host. Deprecated: The Lifecycle Environment of a Host should be set by the Activation Key. Removed from the API since Katello 4.12.

operatingsystem.description: Operating System to register the host in. Operating system must have a C(host_init_config) template assigned.

packages.description: Packages to install on the host when registered. Multiple packages are to be given as a space delimited string.

remote_execution_interface.description: Identifier of the Host interface for Remote execution.

repo.description: Repository URL (yum/dnf) or full sources.list entry (apt). Deprecated: Use the I(repo_data) option instead. This option was deprecated in version Foreman 3.11.

repo_gpg_key_url.description: URL of the GPG key for the repository. Deprecated: Use the I(repo_data) option instead. This option was deprecated in version Foreman 3.11.

repo_data.description: Array with repository URL and corresponding GPG key URL. Each element is a dictionary with keys C(repo) and C(repo_gpg_key_url).

setup_insights.description: If this is set to C(true), C(insights-client) will be installed and registered on Red Hat family operating systems.

setup_remote_execution.description: If this is set to true, SSH keys will be installed on the host.

setup_remote_execution_pull.description: If this is set to true, pull provider client will be deployed on the host.

smart_proxy.description: Name of Smart Proxy. This Proxy must have both the C(Templates) and C(Registration) features enabled.

update_packages.description: Update all packages on the host.

organization.description: Organization to register the host in.

location.description: Location to register the host in.

product.description: Product to which the repository lives in

content_type.description: The content type of the repository

ignore_global_proxy.description: Whether content sync should use or ignore the global http proxy setting This is deprecated with Katello 3.13 It has been superseeded by I(http_proxy_policy)

http_proxy_policy.description: Which proxy to use for content synching

http_proxy.description: Name of the http proxy to use for content synching Should be combined with I(http_proxy_policy='use_selected_http_proxy')

download_concurrency.description: download concurrency for sync from upstream as the API does not return this value, this will break idempotence for this module

download_policy.description: The download policy for sync from upstream. The download policy C(background) is deprecated and not available since Katello 4.3.

mirror_on_sync.description: toggle "mirror on sync" where the state of the repository mirrors that of the upstream repository at sync time This is deprecated with Katello 4.3 It has been superseeded by I(mirroring_policy=mirror_content_only)

mirroring_policy.description: Policy to set for mirroring content Supported since Katello 4.3

verify_ssl_on_sync.description: verify the upstream certifcates are signed by a trusted CA

upstream_password.description: Password to access upstream repository. When this parameter is set, the module will not be idempotent.

docker_upstream_name.description: name of the upstream docker repository only available for I(content_type=docker)

docker_tags_whitelist.description: list of tags to sync for Container Image repository only available for I(content_type=docker) Deprecated since Katello 4.4

deb_releases.description: comma separated list of releases to be synced from deb-archive only available for I(content_type=deb)

deb_components.description: comma separated list of repo components to be synced from deb-archive only available for I(content_type=deb)

deb_architectures.description: comma separated list of architectures to be synced from deb-archive only available for I(content_type=deb)

deb_errata_url.description: URL to sync Debian or Ubuntu errata information from only available on Orcharhino only available for I(content_type=deb)

ignorable_content.description: List of content units to ignore while syncing a yum repository. Must be subset of rpm,drpm,srpm,distribution,erratum.

ansible_collection_requirements.description: Contents of requirement yaml file to sync from URL

auto_enabled.description: repositories will be automatically enabled on a registered host subscribed to this product

os_versions.description: Identifies whether the repository should be disabled on a client with a non-matching OS version. A maximum of one OS version can be selected. Set to C([]) to disable filtering again.

arch.description: Architecture of content in the repository Set to C(noarch) to disable the architecture restriction again.

include_tags.description: List of tags to sync for a container image repository.

exclude_tags.description: List of tags to exclude when syncing a container image repository.

retain_package_versions_count.description: The maximum number of versions of each package to keep.

metadata_expire.description: Set the metadata expiration time (in seconds) for a yum repository.

ansible_collection_auth_token.description: The token key to use for authentication.

ansible_collection_auth_url.description: The URL to receive a session token from, e.g. used with Automation Hub.

depth.description: An option to specify how many ostree commits to traverse.

exclude_refs.description: List of tags to exclude during an ostree sync. The wildcards C(*), C(?) are recognized. C(exclude_refs) is evaluated after C(include_refs).

excludes.description: Python packages to exclude from the upstream URL. You may also specify versions, for example: C(django~=2.0).

include_refs.description: List of refs to include during an ostree sync. The wildcards C(*), C(?) are recognized.

includes.description: Python packages to include from the upstream URL, You may also specify versions, for example: C(django~=2.0). Leave empty to include every package.

keep_latest_packages.description: The amount of latest versions of a package to keep on sync, includes pre-releases if synced. Defaults to keep all versions.

package_types.description: Package types to sync for Python content, separated by comma. FIXME Leave empty to get every package type.

upstream_authentication_token.description: Upstream authentication token string for yum repositories.

product.description: Product to which the repository lives in

theforeman.foreman.repository_set.short_description: Enable/disable Red Hat Repositories available through subscriptions
theforeman.foreman.repository_set.description: Enable/disable Red Hat Repositories that are available through subscriptions

label.description: Label of the repository set, can be used in place of I(name) & I(product)

repositories.description: Release version and base architecture of the repositories to enable. Some repository sets require only I(basearch) or only I(releasever) to be set. See the examples how you can obtain this information using M(theforeman.foreman.resource_info). Required when I(all_repositories) is unset or C(false).

all_repositories.description: Affect all available repositories in the repository set instead of listing them in I(repositories). Required when I(repositories) is unset or an empty list.

state.description: Whether the repositories are enabled or not

theforeman.foreman.repository_set_info.short_description: Fetch information about Red Hat Repositories
theforeman.foreman.repository_set_info.description: Fetch information about Red Hat Repositories

product.description: Product to which the I(repository) lives in

repository.description:
Name of the repository to sync
If omitted, all repositories in I(product) are synched.

resource.description: Resource to search Set to an invalid choice like I(foo) see all available options.

search.description: Search query to use If None, all resources are returned

params.description: Add parameters to the API call if necessary If not specified, no additional parameters are passed

organization.description: Scope the searched resource by organization

full_details.description: If C(True) all details about the found resources are returned

filters.description: Filters with permissions for this role

theforeman.foreman.scap_content.description: Create, update, and delete SCAP content

updated_title.description: New SCAP content title. When this parameter is set, the module will not be idempotent.

theforeman.foreman.scap_tailoring_file.description: Create, update, and delete SCAP Tailoring Files

updated_name.description: New name of the tailoring file. When this parameter is set, the module will not be idempotent.

theforeman.foreman.scc_account.description: Manage SUSE Customer Center Accounts This module requires the foreman_scc_manager plugin set up in the server See U(https://github.com/ATIX-AG/foreman_scc_manager)

name.description: Name of the suse customer center account

login.description: Login id of suse customer center account

scc_account_password.description: Password of suse customer center account

base_url.description: URL of SUSE for suse customer center account

interval.description: Interval for syncing suse customer center account

sync_date.description: Last Sync time of suse customer center account

test_connection.description: Test suse customer center account credentials that connects to the server

updated_name.description: Name to be updated of suse customer center account

state.description: State of the suse customer center account

theforeman.foreman.scc_product.short_description: Subscribe SUSE Customer Center Account Products
theforeman.foreman.scc_product.description: Manage SUSE Customer Center Products This module requires the foreman_scc_manager plugin set up in the server See U(https://github.com/ATIX-AG/foreman_scc_manager)

scc_product.description: Full name of the product of suse customer center account. The I(friendly_name) alias is deprecated as it refers to an attribute that does not uniquely identify a product and not used for product lookups since SCC Manager 1.8.6.

scc_account.description: Name of the suse customer center account associated with product

value.description: value to set the Setting to if missing, reset to default

theforeman.foreman.smart_class_parameter.description: Update Smart Class Parameters. Smart Class Parameters are created/deleted for Puppet classes during import and cannot be created or deleted otherwise.

puppetclass_name.description: Name of the puppetclass that own the parameter

description.description: Description of the Smart Class Parameter

override.description: Whether the smart class parameter value is managed by Foreman

hidden_value.description: When enabled the parameter is hidden in the UI.

omit.description: Don't send this parameter in classification output. Puppet will use the value defined in the Puppet manifest for this parameter.

override_value_order.description: The order in which values are resolved.

validator_rule.description: Used to enforce certain values for the parameter values.

parameter_type.description: Types of variable values. If C(none), set the parameter type to empty value.

required.description: If true, will raise an error if there is no default value and no matcher provide a value.

merge_overrides.description: Merge all matching values (only array/hash type).

merge_default.description: Include default value when merging all matching values.

theforeman.foreman.smart_class_parameter.short_description: Manage Smart Class Parameter Override Values
theforeman.foreman.smart_class_parameter.description: Manage Smart Class Parameter Override Values

puppetclass.description: Puppet Class the Smart Class Parameter belongs to

smart_class_parameter.description: Smart Class Parameter the Override Value belongs to

omit.description: Foreman will not send this parameter in classification output

value.description: Override value, required if omit is false

theforeman.foreman.smart_proxy.description: Create, update and delete Smart Proxies

lifecycle_environments.description: Lifecycle Environments synced to the Smart Proxy. Only available for Katello installations.

download_policy.description: The download policy for the Smart Proxy Only available for Katello installations. The download policy C(background) is deprecated and not available since Katello 4.3. The download policy C(streamed) is available since Katello 4.5.

theforeman.foreman.snapshot.description: Manage Snapshots for Host Entities This module can create, update, revert and delete snapshots This module requires the foreman_snapshot_management plugin set up in the server See: U(https://github.com/ATIX-AG/foreman_snapshot_management)

include_ram.description: Option to add RAM (only available for VMWare compute-resource)

quiesce.description: Option to create quiesce snapshot (only available for VMWare compute-resource)

theforeman.foreman.status_info.description: Get status information from the server

updated_name.description: New subnet name. When this parameter is set, the module will not be idempotent.

dns_primary.description: Primary DNS server for this subnet

dns_secondary.description: Secondary DNS server for this subnet

domains.description: List of DNS domains the subnet should assigned to

cidr.description: CIDR prefix length; Required if I(network_type=IPv4) and no I(mask) provided

mask.description: Subnet netmask. Required if I(network_type=IPv4) and no I(cidr) prefix length provided

from_ip.description: First IP address of the host IP allocation pool

to_ip.description: Last IP address of the host IP allocation pool

boot_mode.description: Boot mode used by hosts in this subnet

dhcp_proxy.description: DHCP Smart proxy for this subnet

httpboot_proxy.description: HTTP Boot Smart proxy for this subnet

tftp_proxy.description: TFTP Smart proxy for this subnet

discovery_proxy.description: Discovery Smart proxy for this subnet This option is only available if the discovery plugin is installed.

dns_proxy.description: Reverse DNS Smart proxy for this subnet

template_proxy.description: Template Smart proxy for this subnet

bmc_proxy.description: BMC Smart proxy for this subnet

remote_execution_proxies.description: Remote execution Smart proxies for this subnet This option is only available if the remote_execution plugin is installed. This will always report I(changed=true) when used with I(remote_execution < 4.1.0), due to a bug in the plugin.

externalipam_proxy.description: External IPAM proxy for this subnet. Only relevant if I(ipam=External IPAM).

externalipam_group.description: External IPAM group for this subnet. Only relevant if I(ipam=External IPAM).

theforeman.foreman.subscription_manifest.description: Upload, refresh and delete Subscription Manifests

manifest_path.description: Path to the manifest zip file This parameter will be ignored if I(state=absent) or I(state=refreshed)

enabled.description: Whether the sync plan is active

sync_date.description: Start date and time of the first synchronization. Multiple formats are accepted, but only C(YYYY-mm-dd HH:MM:SS +z) (e.g. C(2024-08-01 00:00:00 +0000)) will be idempotent.

cron_expression.description: A cron expression as found in crontab files This must be provided together with I(interval='custom cron').

products.description: List of products to include in the sync plan

theforeman.foreman.templates_import.description: Sync provisioning templates, report_templates, partition tables and job templates from external git repository or file system. Based on foreman_templates plugin U(https://github.com/theforeman/foreman_templates).

prefix.description: Adds specified string to beginning of all imported templates that do not yet have that prefix.

associate.description: Associate to Operatingsystems, Locations and Organizations based on metadata.

verbose.description: Add template reports to the output.

branch.description: Branch of the I(repo). Only for git-based repositories.

repo.description: Filesystem path or repo (with protocol), for example /tmp/dir or git://example.com/repo.git or https://example.com/repo.git.

filter.description: Sync only templates with name matching this regular expression, after I(prefix) was applied. Case-insensitive, snippets are not filtered.

dirname.description: The directory within Git repo containing the templates.

http_proxy_policy.description: HTTP proxy policy for template sync. You can choose no HTTP proxy, global HTTP proxy, or a custom HTTP proxy (C(selected)) If you choose 'selected', provide the C(http_proxy) parameter.

http_proxy.description: HTTP proxy to use for template sync. Use this parameter together with C(http_proxy_policy=selected)

mail.description: Email address of the user Required when creating a new user

admin.description: Whether or not the user is an administrator

user_password.description: Password for the user. When this parameter is set, the module will not be idempotent.

default_location.description: The location that the user uses by default

default_organization.description: The organization that the user uses by default

auth_source.description: Authentication source where the user exists

timezone.description: Timezone for the user If blank it will use the browser timezone.

locale.description: The language locale for the user

roles.description: List of roles assigned to the user

theforeman.foreman.usergroup.description: Create, update, and delete user groups

updated_name.description: New user group name. When this parameter is set, the module will not be idempotent.

admin.description: Whether or not the users in this group are administrators

roles.description: List of roles assigned to the group

users.description: List of users assigned to the group

usergroups.description: List of other groups assigned to the group

theforeman.foreman.wait_for_task.description: Wait for a task to finish

timeout.description: How much time the task should take to be finished

target_url.description: The URL to call when the webhook is triggered Required when creating a new webhook

http_method.description: The HTTP method used in the webhook

http_content_type.description: The HTTP content type for the webhook

event.description: Name of the event that shall trigger the webhook Required when creating a new webhook

verify_ssl.description: Verify SSL certs for the webhook

ssl_ca_certs.description: X509 Certification Authorities concatenated in PEM format

webhook_username.description: Username for the webhook, if required

webhook_password.description: Password for the webhook, if required

proxy_authorization.description: Authorize with client certificate and validate CA from Settings
